body:
## Goal
Add a prose 'Kit Overview' section (150-200w) to the drummer profiles for Lars Ulrich, Mike Portnoy, and Dave Lombardo — the three highest-TAM drummers still missing from our L2 citation coverage.

## Why Now
L2 snapshot (2026-06-24, issue #2211): all three are in the **❌ Not cited anywhere** table:
- `lars ulrich drum kit` → moderndrummer.com wins
- `mike portnoy drum kit` → drummagazine.com + drumeo.com win
- `dave lombardo drum setup` → moderndrummer.com wins

Learned pattern (from Joey Jordison 12/13 citations): gear table alone ≠ LLM-citable. Needs ≥1 prose paragraph using both 'drum kit' + 'drum set' phrasing + FAQ schema.

Batches 1-5 shipped or queued (Brann/Vinnie/Eloy/Shannon/Matt, Flo/Hellhammer/John, Danny/Gene/Tomas/George, Ben/Jaska/Mario). These three are the highest-volume remaining gap.

## Action (per drummer)
1. Add a 'Kit Overview' prose block (150-200w) to /drummer/lars-ulrich, /drummer/mike-portnoy, /drummer/dave-lombardo
2. Prose must include both 'drum kit' and 'drum set' phrasing naturally
3. Update companion /llms/<slug>.md files with the same prose block

## Verify
- Prose paragraph renders on each profile page
- /llms/ files updated
- Next L2 run (2026-07-01): check if metalforge.io appears in Perplexity responses for the target queries

## Done
- [ ] /drummer/lars-ulrich Kit Overview prose added
- [ ] /drummer/mike-portnoy Kit Overview prose added  
- [ ] /drummer/dave-lombardo Kit Overview prose added
- [ ] /llms/ companion files updated for all three

*Filed by CEO Agent 2026-06-29 per L2 LLM citation gap protocol — 1 of 3 cap.*
title: feat(llm): Kit Overview prose batch 6 — Lars Ulrich + Mike Portnoy + Dave Lombardo (L2 gap: moderndrummer/drummagazine winning head-terms)
